detaileddescription.para: Whether or not we are using V2 sessions currently in the OSS. If we are, then all methods in this interface will warn and short circuit since this is for V1 parties.
Instance of the subsystem that created this interface
Map of user IDs to a map of party IDs and their associated party objects
Use this lock to prevent racing condition when accessing the UserIdToPartiesMap
Map of user IDs associated with an array of party invites
Store an array of delegates to execute when party join complete

memberdef.argsstring: (const IOnlineSubsystem *Subsystem, TSharedPtr< FOnlinePartySystemAccelByte, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > &OutInterfaceInstance)
memberdef.name: GetFromSubsystem

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem passed in.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem instance that we wish to get this interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (const UWorld *World, TSharedPtr< FOnlinePartySystemAccelByte, ESPMode::ThreadSafe > &OutInterfaceInstance)
memberdef.name: GetFromWorld

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem associated with the world passed in.

parameterdescription.para: World instance that we wish to get the interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Initialize data relating to party interface

memberdef.argsstring: (const TSharedRef< const FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUser > &UserId)
memberdef.name: RegisterRealTimeLobbyDelegates

detaileddescription.para: Method used by the Identity interface to register delegates for friend notifications to this interface to get real-time updates from the Lobby websocket.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId)

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to check if the current user is the member of any party currently

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId)
memberdef.name: GetCurrentPartyMemberCount

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get the current party member count for the player's current party

simplesect.para: an integer representing the amount of players in the user's party, or -1 if not in a party

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId)
memberdef.name: GetFirstPartyIdForUser

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get first party for user.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString &Output, const FUniqueNetId &LocalUserId, const FOnlinePartyId &PartyId)
memberdef.name: GetPartyCode

detaileddescription.para:
Get a PartyCode from the created party for invitation and joining purpose Related to JoinParty function that requires const FString& InPartyCode
Output
Reference to the returned result if operation is success/true.
LocalUserId
PartyId
if the operation is success.

simplesect.para: party type id for the primary party - the primary party is the party that will be addressable via the social panel

detaileddescription.para: Hidden default constructor, the constructor that takes in a subsystem instance should be used instead.
